content.en:
Boundary Division.

These realm gods are back, and they came to meet the gods of the underworld for the first time.

Since the end of the last demon invasion, the god of the underworld has naturally recovered from his injuries.

At this time, he was also paying attention to the matter of the super-large Eternal Kingdom Alliance, after all, a strange super-large Eternal Kingdom Alliance suddenly appeared in the Eternal Kingdom Boundary, and he was naturally very curious.

However, he needs to guard the Boundary Court Branch, and he naturally doesn't need to deal with ordinary trivial matters by himself.

That's why he sent a few realm gods over.

After these realm gods saw the gods of the Netherworld, they immediately reported the situation.

"Lord of the Underworld God, we have already found out the situation of the super-large Eternal Kingdom Alliance, he is a super-large Eternal Kingdom Alliance opened up by the Ye Heavenly Realm God, but the Ye Heavenly Realm God is very arrogant, he doesn't want any forces to enter the Endless Kingdom Alliance, but the entire Endless Realm Alliance is very empty, enough to accommodate a large number of living beings and forces, as a result, the Ye Heavenly Realm God is so selfish! A realm god reported.

Subsequently, the 26 of them told some of the situation of the Endless Realm Alliance, so that the gods of the Underworld could thoroughly understand the situation.

After listening, the god of the underworld frowned slightly.

In his opinion, Ye Tian's move was indeed a bit excessive.

Occupy a thousand eternal realms, but do not allow other forces to settle in, only allow the human race to live in the Endless Realms Alliance, if every force is like this, then how can it develop?

Even if these eternal kingdoms were opened up by the human race, they would not work.

Rules are rules and cannot be violated.

"I'll go find the Ye Heavenly Realm God in person!"

The god of the underworld said.

"Yes!"

These realm gods answered.

They felt that the gods of the Underworld were going to be unlucky, and this matter would definitely be resolved, and Ye Tian would inevitably give in at that time.

So, they immediately went back, and they prepared to relocate their forces to the Endless Realm Alliance, so as to occupy a part of the territory.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

The god of the Underworld shuttled quickly, and soon after, he came here.

Soon, the god of the Underworld saw Ye Tian.

"I've seen the god of the underworld!"

Ye Tian still shouted politely.

The God of the Underworld Realm was a little surprised, he hadn't seen it in such a short time, Ye Tian had actually condensed four Eternal Realm Spirits and broken through to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, this terrifying ascension speed shocked him too much.

But even a mid-level cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm was not qualified to occupy a super-large Eternal Realm.

Thereupon.

The God of the Underworld Realm got straight to the point and said, "Ye Tianjie God, you should know what I'm here for, right?"

"Isn't the God of the Nether Realm also trying to persuade me to let other forces and living beings enter my Endless Realm Alliance?" Ye Tian frowned.

"Yes!" the god of the Underworld replied: "This is the rule of the Realm Court, all the eternal realms of the Eternal Realm, from the beginning of the opening, have stipulated that seventy percent of the territory is given to other forces and living beings, and they can reserve one-third of their territory. And you, the Endless Kingdom Alliance, the Terrans, can also retain thirty percent of the Eternal Kingdom, and the other seventy percent of the Eternal Kingdom will be ceded to other forces. "

"It can't be!"

Ye Tian flatly refused.

The God of the Underworld Realm sighed and said, "Ye Heaven Realm God, don't make it difficult for me. If you don't agree, the other gods will be dissatisfied, and thousands of gods will be dissatisfied, and this is a very serious matter. Besides, you have already relocated an eternal kingdom of the human race to the realm of the gods, and the treatment of the human race is already unimaginable to other forces, there is no need to be so greedy!"

"It's you who are greedy, I didn't get help from the Realm, everything depends on the Terrans themselves, you want seventy percent of the territory, I can't agree. "

Ye Tian's attitude was very resolute, and there was no room for negotiation.

This moment.

The God of the Underworld Realm was also completely annoyed, he was a middle-level peak powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm who had condensed six Eternal Realm spirits, and he was only one step away from breaking through to the high level of the Eternal Realm God Realm!

A high-level Eternal Realm God Realm, placed in the Realm God Realm, is a top-notch existence.

Moreover, he is also from a top force in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and he also holds an important position in the realm court, and his status far surpasses Ye Tian.

He came to the Endless Realm Alliance in person, but Ye Tian didn't give face.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, do you really want to disobey me?"

The god of the Underworld asked, with a hint of anger in his tone.

"God of the Underworld, you are not qualified to say this to me!"

"What?"

The God of the Underworld was completely furious, and he wanted to kill Ye Tian immediately.

"God of the Underworld, then I'll learn a thing or two, if you can defeat me, I can agree, if you lose, then go back to the Realm Division. Ye Tian said.

"Very well, I want to see what confidence you have to say this!"

The Underworld Shinto.

Rushing!!!

......

Death Zone.

Ye Tian and the God of the Underworld began to fight.

Ye Tian immediately urged the Tianyan Scale Armor Technique, and used the Tianyan Peng Light Technique to kill the God of the Underworld, and he also cast the Tianyan Red Dragon Flame, combined with the Spear of the Ruin Sun, to burst out with even more terrifying attack power.

Thundered!!!!

They collided in an instant.

The God of the Underworld originally thought that he could defeat Ye Tian in an instant, after all, the gap between condensing six 130 Eternal Realm Spirits and condensing four Eternal Realm Spirits was too big!

But he never expected that Ye Tian's strength would be comparable to his own, which made the gods of the Underworld dumbfounded.

Killing again and again, Ye Tian was very desperate, and it was a completely lifeless way of fighting.

Gradually, Ye Tian and the God of the Underworld were injured.

But at this moment, Ye Tian cast another perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique, the Tianyan Ancient Phoenix Technique!

This Perfect Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique could allow Ye Tian's injuries to recover instantly.

As a result, he recovered from his injuries and continued to fight against the gods of the underworld.

Gradually, the Underworld God was not lightly injured, and he was about to be unable to withstand Ye Tian's onslaught.

Finally.

He confessed.

"Ye Tianjie God, stop, I admit defeat!"

The god of the underworld said helplessly.

Wow!

Ye Tian stopped, he wouldn't really kill the God of the Underworld, if he wanted to kill the God of the Underworld, the Realm Court would not let him go, and the strength behind the God of the Underworld would not let him go.

Besides, he has achieved his goal, and there is no need to continue to attack.

As a result, Ye Tian and the gods of the Underworld stopped fighting.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, I admit defeat, I won't care about the Endless Realm Alliance anymore!"

Say, the god of the underworld has left here.
